title: Beyond curl-noise: helicity and phase coherence controls for divergence-free flow fields
description: A solver-free method for synthesizing divergence-free vector fields for the procedural animation of smoke, particles, and other advected media, with three mutually independent controls: spectral slope, helicity, and phase coherence. Built in the frequency domain on the helical (curl-eigenvector) basis; a phase-coherence control interpolates inter-mode phases from random to structured at a fixed power spectrum; an analytic Beltrami mode-sum evaluates per pixel in a fragment shader. Includes the preprint (main.tex/main.pdf) and pinned-seed reproduction code (E1-E5 + GLSL shader).
